title: stelis hoppii
intro: Stelis hoppii, also known as Hoppii or Hoppii Orchid, is a flowering plant species in the orchid family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis hoppii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. Herbal preparations of Stelis hoppii are typically made by infusing the leaves or flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
